title: Podman: Container image signing & verification in k8s clusters
body:
I am following up on conversation on community meeting on June 1st, 2021 [(link)](https://hackmd.io/fc1zraYdS0-klJ2KJcfC7w)

1.  It would be nice to document or explore container image signing & verification in k8s clusters using Podman.
2. It was brought up that some internal meetings are being planned so it would be nice to open those discussions to a larger community especially on signing and verification aspects.
